headline: Assessing Illinois Tool Works (ITW) Valuation As Growth Concerns Weigh On Investor Sentiment
summary: Recent concerns about weak organic revenue growth and slower earnings per share progress at Illinois Tool Works (ITW) have increased focus on how its strong free cash flow margin supports the current investment case. See our latest analysis for Illinois Tool Works. ITW’s share price has slipped about 8% over the past month and 14% over the past quarter, while a 5.1% 1 year total shareholder return points to more muted, yield supported momentum despite recent dividend affirmation and AGM...
